description: dispatch-save-request.ts remains dead code. Sprint 2 FIND-005 flagged this as dead code; the pipeline.ts inlines its own dispatch logic and never imports this module. Yet step3-write-markdown.test.ts tests this dead module exclusively, providing false coverage confidence. 95 lines of production code and 303 lines of test code exercise a code path that is never invoked by the pipeline.

evidence.snippet: // entire file is dead code — no imports found anywhere in the codebase
